## Problem and evidence

Describe the observed issue and the evidence that confirms it.

## Change

Describe the smallest change made and why it addresses the cause.

## Verification

List the exact checks run after the final edit and their actual results.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the installable `groundwork/` skill portable and dependency-free.
- [ ] I linked every new reference from `groundwork/SKILL.md`.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate_skill.py` after my final edit.
- [ ] I ran the affected exercise or stress-test suites.
- [ ] I did not weaken or skip existing checks to make this change pass.
- [ ] I updated documentation and `HONEST-LIMITS.md` where needed.
- [ ] I identified any remaining assumptions or unknowns.
